fee_note: Entry fees use the Cannes Lions 2026 “Fee after 2 April 2026” tier from canneslions.com, applied as a rough cost proxy for every festival year.
hub_overrides_note: Creative Data Lions 2015–2018: The Work /awards/results/cannes-lions?entry_type_id=… does not publish these tables (no extractable payload). Counts match the winners-shortlists Creative Data hub (Grand Prix + metals + shortlists) on lovethework.com.

competitiveness_note: Competitiveness compares categories using pooled festival years: published entry totals divided by metal win rows from The Work (higher = more entries per metal line). Metals are row counts, not unique campaigns—use scores for relative ranking, not literal odds.
subcategory_cost_note: Priority (0–100) is higher when average cost (€ spent per point won) and competitiveness (entries per metals won) are both lower relative to other subcategories — favouring subcategories that are easier to score.
